lex.bot.voicesettings.CfnAbout: Defines settings for using an Amazon Polly voice to communicate with a user.

lex.bot.voicesettings.Engine.Description: Indicates the type of Amazon Polly voice that Amazon Lex should use for voice interaction with the user. For more information, see the [`engine` parameter of the `SynthesizeSpeech` operation](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/polly/latest/dg/API_SynthesizeSpeech.html#polly-SynthesizeSpeech-request-Engine) in the *Amazon Polly developer guide*.  If you do not specify a value, the default is `standard`.

lex.bot.voicesettings.VoiceId.Description: The identifier of the Amazon Polly voice to use.
